entities.name: Modular Design for Context Efficiency
entities.context: Design principle P20 for breaking large monolithic outputs into focused, independently useful modules

entities.name: Progressive Loading
entities.context: Technique of loading minimal context first, then adding detail as needed

entities.name: Context Efficiency
entities.context: Goal of enabling selective loading and efficient operation through modular organization

entities.name: Circular Dependencies
entities.context: Anti-pattern to avoid when designing modular systems

entities.name: Clear Interfaces
entities.context: Design quality enabling modular components to be independently testable

relationships.context: P20 enables progressive loading as a core technique
P20 exists to achieve context efficiency in large systems
P20 explicitly warns against circular dependencies between modules
Modular components should have clear interfaces per P20 examples
